creator: tatsuki_makino@hotmail.com
text:
Created attachment 240625
proposed patch for audio/alsa-seq-server

Hello.

If this is incorporated, I think it will kldload on its own in /etc/rc.subr.


(In reply to Yuri Victorovich from comment #0)

cuse4bsd was up to FreeBSD 10.x and is supposed to have changed to cuse_load="YES" since FreeBSD 11.0.
But I have never used FreeBSD 11.x, so I don't know :)

Regards.
